findings.title: OpenClaw control-ui-config.json exposed
findings.description: /__openclaw/control-ui-config.json accessible (version: )
findings.evidence:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>OpenClaw Control</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="dark light" />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./favicon.svg" />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="./favicon-32.png" />
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="./apple-touch-icon.png" />
    <script type="module" crossorigin src="./assets/index-BtuoDTGq.js"></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" crossorigin href="./assets/index-B3tl1vnL.css">
  <script>window.__OPENCLAW_CONTROL_UI_BASE_PATH__="";window.__OPENCLAW_ASSISTANT_NAME__="Assistant";window.__OPENCLAW_ASSISTANT_AVATAR__="A";</script></head>
  <body>
    <openclaw-app></openclaw-app>
  </body>
</html>
